question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: There are 3 different ways to use Q²M Bathe+ : - 1st Pour into a bucket of water between 15ml of Q²M Bathe+ - Mix the solution - Use the Q²M Smoothie to transfer the solution on your vehicle - proceed with your wash routine - 2nd Pour Q²M Bathe+ directly onto your Q²M Smoothie and proceed panel by panel your washing process - repeat for each panel - 3rd Poor 20ml of Q²M Bathe+ into your Foam Gun - Spray all over the vehicle and rinse off.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Pour into a bucket of water between 15-20ml of Q²M Bathe - Mix the solution - Use the Q²M Smoothie to transfer the solution on your vehicle - proceed with your wash routine

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Spray on a small section at the time - Do not let the product dry - Rinse off.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Spray liberally over all surfaces of the car, for wheels proceed with agitation of the product - let it react and rinse off. Do not let it dry - Do not apply on hot surfaces.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: We recommend the dilution before use - Spray abundantly on the selected working panel - proceed with the claying process - remove excess of product with a microfibre.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: De-structure a small piece of Clay big enough to cover 1/3 of your hand - Spray abundantly Q²M ClayLube of the panel you desire to decontaminate - Wipe the piece of clay on straight motion over the selected area - Wipe excess of lubricant with a micro fiver - asses result - repeat of you still feel contamination on the touch - Once the clay if a surcharge of contamination use another piece over risking damaging the surface you are working on.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Spray on a small section at the time - Use a soft microfibre and wipe the affected area multiple time. If necessary – repeat the process - Do not let the product dry, especially on Glass.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Spray liberally on cold contaminated surface of your vehicle - Do not spray on direct sunlight - Do not let it dry - Rinse off - Re-apply if necessary.

question_en: How to use it ?
answer_en: Dilute it from 1:5 up to 1:15 into your Foam Canon or Foamer Sprayer. Spray all over the exterior of your vehicle - Let it drag down the dirt for 3 to 5 minutes - Rinse off and proceed with your wash routine.

answer_en: Dispose of one pump of product onto the applicator of your choice (you may use our Q²M MF Applicator). Rub the product over the surface of the side wall of your tire. Possible use on both wet and dry tires. Ensure optimal surface preparation with the use of Q²M TireCleaner.

question_en: How to apply ?
answer_en: Spray liberally over the rubber sidewall of your tire, let it react for a brief moment & agitate - let it react and rinse off. Do not let it dry - Do not apply on hot surfaces - On dirty tires we recommend a dry application.
